text:
Instant Foreign Language School (即席外語スクール) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

|bgcolor="D6E3FF"|

|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|Instant Foreign Language School

(Sokusekigaigo Sukuuru)
|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|(Instant Language School)

|align=center colspan="3"|#059
|

!
|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: A 
Transformation: 20
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Spend time studying a language at this school, and you will accrue time on a timer (included). While the timer is activated and counting down, you will be fluent.
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|
|}

Summary

Instant Foreign Language School (即席外語スクール): This card allows for the user to summon an Instant Foreign Language School. It allows for the caster to attend lessons hosted on a language of your choice for a while. Every amount of time you spend studying, it gets recorded on the timer provided. When not studying, you can set the timer to countdown. During the countdown, the user is fluent in that language. The effects stop when the time runs out. You are then able to attend the school again to gain more time on the timer.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.059 :: 即席外語スクール 
ここで勉強した時間が専用タイマーに加算される。このタイマーを押している間だけ、外国語が堪能になる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.059 :: Instant Foreign Language School 
Time that you study here is added to the dedicated timer. Only whilst you hold down the timer, you will be fluent in this foreign language.
|}
